setting: 夜の帰り道、久しぶりに元恋人から電話が来る
lyrics:
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else

[Verse 1]
Smell like smoke, nuit de l'homme
It's been a while since we last spoke
So tell me, how's it go?
Still love blues, nothin' new
Careless love, I've had a few
How 'bout you?

[Chorus]
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
Don't need nobody else

[Verse 2]
I never have thought
When you're gone
I'd find it hard to carry on
And it's probably 'cause
I fell in love way back then
And I think about us when
I think about us when

[Chorus]
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
I got nobody else
All my friends are drunk again
And I'm stumblin' back to bed all by myself
I got, I got nobody else

[Outro]
Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, no-no
Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh

lyricsJa.ja: あの頃、恋に落ちてしまったから

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It's been a while since we last spoke.
sentences.displayHtml: It's been a while since we last spoke.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、Mia……最後に話してから、ずいぶん経ったね。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I didn't expect your call this late, but I'm glad you did.
sentences.displayHtml: I didn't expect your call this late, but I'm glad you did.

conversation.japanese: うん。こんな遅くに電話が来るとは思わなかったけど、話せてうれしいよ。それで、最近どう？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I left the bar early, and now I'm stumblin' back to bed.
sentences.displayHtml: I left the bar early, and now I'm stumblin' back to bed.

conversation.japanese: 正直、何も変わってないよ。バーを早めに出て、今はふらつきながらベッドに戻ってるところ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Ren, you always say you're fine, but you sound lonely.
sentences.displayHtml: Ren, you always say you're fine, but you sound lonely.

conversation.japanese: またひとりで？Ren、いつも平気だって言うけど、声が寂しそう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I keep saying I need nobody else, but nights like this make that sound fake.
sentences.displayHtml: I keep saying I need nobody else, but nights like this make that sound fake.

conversation.japanese: 誰もいらないって言い続けてるけど、こういう夜はそれが嘘みたいに聞こえる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Careless love, I've had a few, and none of it really stays.
sentences.displayHtml: Careless love, I've had a few, and none of it really stays.

conversation.japanese: その気持ちはわかるよ。軽はずみな恋もいくつかしたけど、結局どれも残らなかった。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I never have thought I'd find it this hard to carry on.
sentences.displayHtml: I never have thought I'd find it this hard to carry on.

sentences.text: I guess part of me is still stuck way back then.
sentences.displayHtml: I guess part of me is still stuck way back then.

conversation.japanese: こんなに前に進むのが難しいなんて思ってもみなかった。たぶん、僕の一部はまだあの頃に取り残されてる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe you don't have to solve it tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe you don't have to solve it tonight.

sentences.text: Just get home safely, and don't pretend I got nobody else when you need someone.
sentences.displayHtml: Just get home safely, and don't pretend I got nobody else when you need someone.

conversation.japanese: 今夜すぐ答えを出さなくてもいいよ。無事に帰って。誰かが必要なときに、僕には誰もいないなんて強がらなくていい。
